properties.name: app.datasource.postgresql.url
properties.description: JDBC URL for the PostgreSQL failover datasource.

properties.name: app.datasource.postgresql.username
properties.description: Username for the PostgreSQL failover datasource.

properties.name: app.datasource.postgresql.password
properties.description: Password for the PostgreSQL failover datasource.

properties.name: app.datasource.postgresql.driver-class-name
properties.description: JDBC driver class for the PostgreSQL failover datasource.
